question: Comment exposer les donnees d'une entite via API ?

principles.text: Toujours DTO explicite, jamais entite directe. Un DTO par cas d'usage (Summary, Detail, Create, Update). MapStruct pour mappings simples.

sources.name: OWASP API Security Top 10 API3:2023
sources.quote: Broken Object Property Level Authorization — APIs exposing all object properties without filtering

sources.name: Spring Data JPA Projections
sources.quote: Interface and class-based projections to limit data fetched from database

sources.name: SWEBOK v4 Information Hiding
sources.quote: Information hiding principle limits exposure of internal implementation details

sources.name: Martin Fowler LocalDTO
sources.quote: DTOs should carry data between processes, not within a single process
